script:
set +e
echo '=== AppArmor status ==='
aa-status 2>&1 | head -15
echo '=== SELinux status ==='
getenforce 2>&1
sestatus 2>&1 | head -5
echo '=== denied audit log entries last 30min ==='
dmesg 2>&1 | grep -iE 'denied|apparmor|selinux' | tail -10
journalctl --since '30 min ago' --no-pager 2>&1 | grep -iE 'apparmor.*DENIED|audit.*denied' | tail -10
echo '=== mount info around /home ==='
mount 2>&1 | grep -E '/home|/$' | head -5
findmnt /home/aixa 2>&1 | head -5
echo '=== real path + inode ==='
ls -laiH /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
readlink -f /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== try as aixa using exec sequence + show errno ==='
runuser -u aixa -- python3 -c "import os,errno; \ntry:\n  with open('/home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json') as f: print('READ-OK:', f.read()[:60])\nexcept OSError as e: print('errno=%d (%s) msg=%s' % (e.errno, errno.errorcode.get(e.errno,'?'), e.strerror))" 2>&1 | head -8
echo '===END==='
